146 
LINE_PRCDR_CD_DT 
LABEL: 
Date Line Procedure Performed 
DESCRIPTION: The date upon which the procedure was performed. 
SHORT NAME: LINE_PRCDR_CD_DT 
LONG NAME: LINE_PRCDR_CD_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
OT line 
VALUES: 
Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
Date of the
